title: homileo #3656
definition:
1) to be in company with
 2) to associate with
 3) to stay with
 4) to converse with, talk about: with one
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be in company with
 2) to associate with
 3) to stay with
 4) to converse with, talk about: with one

    NASB:  to consort with, hence to converse with:
